blurb: Apple laptops implement a hardware-enforced microphone disconnect that physically severs the microphone from the system bus when the lid is closed. This disconnect is implemented at the hardware level and cannot be overridden by software, firmware, or the operating system. The design ensures no application, malware, or compromised kernel can activate the microphone when the device is physically shut. iPad models with detachable keyboards implement equivalent hardware disconnect functionality for the keyboard microphone connector, providing the same physical assurance on those platforms.
